response.justification: Aisha brings roughly 17 years of broad engineering experience and recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq, but the role demands director-level strategic AI leadership that her resume does not demonstrate. The position requires recognized AI expertise with demonstrated platforms at scale, deep cloud strategy fluency, and the ability to advise major customers and partners — none of which are evidenced here. Her AI exposure is limited to a role that started in April 2025, she holds no advanced degree in an AI-related field, and there is no indication she has operated at the strategic advisory or thought-leadership scope this principal-level IC role requires.
strengths: ~17 years of diverse engineering experience spanning embedded systems, web, mobile, infrastructure, and recent AI-agent tooling
Entrepreneurial track record with GISCollective (open-source geo-data platform, ongoing since 2016) and conference speaking at FOSS4G
Current hands-on involvement in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generation at re:cinq, demonstrating genuine builder fluency in an emerging space
concerns: No advanced degree in AI or a related field; holds only bachelor's degrees while a Master's or PhD is strongly preferred for this role
AI and cloud expertise is shallow and recent — AI work began April 2025 and cloud exposure is limited to AWS CDK in a pricing-team context
No demonstrated director-level IC scope: no evidence of advising strategic customers, influencing organizational AI strategy, or producing widely recognized AI products or platforms
